headline: 3 Reasons to Sell MTD and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Mettler-Toledo’s shares (currently trading at $1,279) have posted a disappointing 9.4% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 8.5% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
